targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 1 minute) AS time, count() AS messages FROM chat_analytics.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'message_sent' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

WITH toStartOfInterval($__fromTime, INTERVAL 30 seconds) AS from_time, toStartOfInterval($__toTime, INTERVAL 30 seconds) AS to_time SELECT time, ifNull(online_users, 0) AS online_users FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 30 seconds) AS time, argMax(result_count, event_time) AS online_users FROM chat_analytics.events WHERE event_type = 'user_status_changed' AND event_time <= to_time GROUP BY time ORDER BY time WITH FILL FROM from_time TO to_time STEP INTERVAL 30 seconds INTERPOLATE (online_users)) WHERE time >= from_time AND time <= to_time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT countIf(last_status = 'ONLINE') AS online_users FROM (SELECT user_id, argMax(status, event_time) AS last_status FROM chat_analytics.events WHERE event_type = 'user_status_changed' AND user_id != '' GROUP BY user_id)
SELECT greatest(ifNull(argMaxIf(result_count, event_time, event_type = 'user_registered'), 0), uniqExactIf(user_id, user_id != '')) AS registered_users FROM chat_analytics.events
SELECT avg(message_length) AS avg_message_length FROM chat_analytics.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'message_sent'
SELECT count() AS total_messages FROM chat_analytics.events WHERE event_type = 'message_sent'
SELECT avg(result_count) AS avg_results FROM chat_analytics.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'message_search'

SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 1 minute) AS time, event_type, count() AS events FROM chat_analytics.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type IN ('opensearch_index_failed', 'opensearch_search_failed', 'message_rejected', 'websocket_rejected', 'backend_error') GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time ASC, event_type ASC
